arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Bologna: Match Preview
arts.sum: The San Siro is set to host a thrilling Serie A encounter on Wednesday evening as reigning champions Inter Milan welcome Bologna in their quest for a seventh consecutive league victory. With the potential to close the gap on league leaders Napoli to just one point, Inter will be eager to maintain their impressive form against a Bologna side that has proven difficult to beat this season. arts.ttl: “Listen to Yourself”: Materazzi’s Advice to Frattesi on Inter Future
arts.sum: Former Inter Milan defender Marco Materazzi has offered some candid advice to Davide Frattesi amidst swirling transfer rumours. Drawing parallels to his own experience in 2006, Materazzi urges Frattesi to think carefully before making any hasty decisions about leaving Inter.
